description: Opinionated CLI tool pipeline — from argument parsing to distribution

milestones.name: {prefix}: Foundation
milestones.description: Project structure, argument parsing, and command routing

phases.name: CLI Setup
phases.description: Initialize project, configure argument parser, define command structure and help system

issues.title: Set up {project_name} project structure
issues.description: Initialize the CLI project with package manager, entry point, bin configuration, and directory layout

issues.title: Configure argument parser and command routing
issues.description: Set up CLI framework with subcommand routing, global flags, argument validation, and error handling

issues.title: Create help system and usage documentation
issues.description: Implement --help output for all commands, man page generation, and usage examples in README

phases.name: Core Commands
phases.description: Implement primary commands with input validation and structured output formatting

issues.title: Implement primary commands
issues.description: Build the core commands that deliver {project_name}'s main functionality: {description}

issues.title: Add input validation and error handling
issues.description: Validate all command inputs, provide helpful error messages, and handle edge cases gracefully

issues.title: Build output formatting
issues.description: Support multiple output formats (JSON, table, plain text) with --format flag and colored terminal output

milestones.name: {prefix}: Features
milestones.description: Advanced features including configuration, interactive mode, and integrations

phases.name: Advanced Features
phases.description: Add configuration file support, interactive prompts, and external service integrations

issues.title: Add configuration file support
issues.description: Implement config file discovery (project-local and global), parsing, validation, and merge with CLI flags

issues.title: Implement interactive mode and prompts
issues.description: Add interactive prompts for missing required inputs, confirmation dialogs, and guided workflows

issues.title: Build external service integrations
issues.description: Connect to external APIs or services required by {project_name}, with authentication and retry logic

milestones.name: {prefix}: Ship
milestones.description: Testing, cross-platform validation, packaging, and npm publishing

phases.name: Testing & Reliability
phases.description: Comprehensive test suite, error recovery, cross-platform validation, and edge case coverage

issues.title: Add unit and integration tests
issues.description: Write tests for all commands, argument parsing, config loading, output formatting, and error paths

issues.title: Implement error recovery and graceful degradation
issues.description: Handle network failures, missing permissions, invalid configs, and interrupted operations with clear user messaging

issues.title: Test cross-platform compatibility
issues.description: Verify functionality on macOS, Linux, and Windows; fix path handling, shell escaping, and terminal compatibility issues

phases.name: Distribution
phases.description: Package for npm publishing, write installation docs, and prepare for release

issues.title: Configure npm packaging and publishing
issues.description: Set up package.json bin field, bundling, npm publish config, and GitHub release automation

issues.title: Write installation and usage documentation
issues.description: Complete README with install instructions (npm, npx), quickstart guide, full command reference, and examples
